text:
Created attachment 249999
net-im/gotosocial: upgrade to 0.15.0 Shagadelic Sloth

Changelog: https://github.com/superseriousbusiness/gotosocial/releases/tag/v0.15.0

This release brings themes!

On the port level:

- Fix the way GO_BUILDFLAGS is composed.
- Fix the way tests are run.
- tests are still broken in the jail
